---
title: "Calculate Indicators - TEST (Single Indicator)"
output: # html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# R Set-up

```{r}
# Clear workspace
rm(list = ls())
gc()

# Libraries 
library(terra)
library(here)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(aws.s3)

# Authenticate aws
source(here::here('aws_cred.R'))

# Base S3 location (GDAL-style path)
s3_base <- "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data"

dat.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "raw")
roi.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "studyarea")
dum.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "dummy")
ind.dir <- file.path(s3_base, "indicators")

```

# Data

## 0.1 Load Dummy Raster and ROI

```{r}
dum_base <- rast(file.path(dum.dir, "gpw_reproj_algn_natseminat_noshrub_masked.tif"))
roi3 <- vect(file.path(roi.dir, "modelling_study_area_aligned_cnvc_Jan2026.shp"))

# Reproject baseline 
dum_base <- if (file.exists("tmp_data/dum_base_projected.tif")) {
  rast("tmp_data/dum_base_projected.tif")
} else {
  writeRaster(project(dum_base, roi3), "tmp_data/dum_base_projected.tif", overwrite = TRUE)
}

# Enable parallel processing inside terra
terraOptions(cores = parallel::detectCores())

```

# Test Configuration

**Choose which indicator(s) to test:**

```{r}
# TEST SELECTION: Set to TRUE for the indicator(s) you want to test

test_config <- list(
  # Polygon indicators (choose one or more)
  sh_2_4a = TRUE,      # 289 features - memory heavy (took ~7 hours)
  sh_2_4b = FALSE,     # 142 features
  sh_2_5b = FALSE,     # 196 features
  sp_1_1a = FALSE,     # 55 features
  
  # Raster indicators (to test the new raster path)
  gc_3_1 = FALSE,      # Intact grasslands
  gc_3_2 = FALSE,      # Native grasslands
  gc_3_3 = FALSE       # Connectivity
)

# Build list of indicators to test
test_indicators <- names(test_config)[unlist(test_config)]

if (length(test_indicators) == 0) {
  stop("No indicators selected for testing. Set at least one to TRUE in test_config.")
}

cat("Testing indicators:", paste(test_indicators, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

```

# Progress Logging

```{r}
# ---- Progress logging setup ----

log_file <- here::here(
  "logs",
  paste0("indicator_progress_TEST_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S"), ".log")
)

dir.create(dirname(log_file), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

log_msg <- function(msg) {
  timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", timestamp, msg),
      file = log_file,
      append = TRUE)
  # Also print to console
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", timestamp, msg))
}

log_msg("Starting TEST indicator calculation")
log_msg(paste("Testing indicators:", paste(test_indicators, collapse = ", ")))

```

# Load All Indicators

```{r}
# Get all objects in the indicators directory
objs <- get_bucket(
  bucket = "sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing",
  prefix = "ciara-hovis/TomoPrairie/bd_data/indicators/"
)

all_files <- paste0(
  "/vsis3/sagemaker-gst-stage.sharing/",
  sapply(objs, `[[`, "Key")
)

# Separate polygon and raster files
gpkg_files <- all_files[grepl("\\.gpkg$", all_files)]
tif_files <- all_files[grepl("\\.tif$", all_files) & grepl("ind_gc_3_", all_files)]

# Create polygon indicators table
polygon_tbl <- data.frame(
  file = gpkg_files,
  indicator_id = sub("^ind_(.*)\\.gpkg$", "\\1", basename(gpkg_files)),
  type = "polygon",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Create raster indicators table
raster_tbl <- data.frame(
  file = tif_files,
  indicator_id = sub("^ind_(.*)\\.tif$", "\\1", basename(tif_files)),
  type = "raster",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Combine into single table
indicator_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(polygon_tbl, raster_tbl)

log_msg(paste("Total indicators available:", nrow(indicator_tbl)))
log_msg(paste("  - Polygon indicators:", nrow(polygon_tbl)))
log_msg(paste("  - Raster indicators:", nrow(raster_tbl)))

```

# Process Selected Indicators

```{r}
results <- vector("list", length(test_indicators))

for (idx in seq_along(test_indicators)) {
  
  test_id <- test_indicators[idx]
  
  # Find this indicator in the table
  ind_row <- which(indicator_tbl$indicator_id == test_id)
  
  if (length(ind_row) == 0) {
    log_msg(sprintf("WARNING: Indicator %s not found in list", test_id))
    results[[idx]] <- data.frame(
      indicator_id = test_id,
      status = "NOT_FOUND",
      pixel_ones = NA_real_,
      error = "Indicator not found",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    next
  }
  
  id <- indicator_tbl$indicator_id[ind_row]
  type <- indicator_tbl$type[ind_row]
  
  log_msg(sprintf(""))
  log_msg(sprintf("=== INDICATOR %s (%s) ===", id, type))
  
  # Memory status before
  gc()
  mem_before <- as.numeric(system("free -m | grep Mem | awk '{print $7}'", intern = TRUE))
  log_msg(sprintf("Memory available before: %d MB", mem_before))
  
  start_time <- Sys.time()
  
  res <- tryCatch({
    
    if (type == "polygon") {
      # POLYGON PATH
      log_msg(sprintf("Loading polygon vector: %s", indicator_tbl$file[ind_row]))
      v <- vect(indicator_tbl$file[ind_row])
      
      log_msg(sprintf("Original vector: %d features", nrow(v)))
      
      # Union all features into one
      log_msg("Dissolving features with union()...")
      v_one <- terra::union(v)
      
      log_msg(sprintf("After union: %d feature(s)", nrow(v_one)))

      # Extract pixel count from dummy base raster
      log_msg("Extracting pixels from raster...")
      pix_sum <- extract(
        dum_base,
        v_one,
        fun = sum,
        na.rm = TRUE
      )
      
      log_msg(sprintf("Extract result: %d rows", nrow(pix_sum)))
      
      # Sum across all features (in case union didn't fully dissolve)
      pix_val <- sum(pix_sum[, 2], na.rm = TRUE)
      
      # Clean up intermediate objects
      rm(v, v_one, pix_sum)
      gc()
      
      data.frame(
        indicator_id = id,
        status = "SUCCESS",
        pixel_ones = pix_val,
        error = NA_character_,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      
    } else if (type == "raster") {
      # RASTER PATH
      log_msg(sprintf("Loading raster: %s", indicator_tbl$file[ind_row]))
      r <- rast(indicator_tbl$file[ind_row])
      
      log_msg(sprintf("Raster dimensions: %d x %d x %d layers", 
                      nrow(r), ncol(r), nlyr(r)))
      
      # Crop/mask to roi3 to ensure consistency
      log_msg("Cropping/masking to ROI...")
      r_cropped <- crop(r, roi3, mask = TRUE)
      
      # Sum all non-NA pixels
      log_msg("Summing raster values...")
      pix_val <- sum(values(r_cropped), na.rm = TRUE)
      
      log_msg(sprintf("Raster pixel sum: %f", pix_val))
      
      # Clean up
      rm(r, r_cropped)
      gc()
      
      data.frame(
        indicator_id = id,
        status = "SUCCESS",
        pixel_ones = pix_val,
        error = NA_character_,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }

  }, error = function(e) {
    
    log_msg(sprintf("ERROR: %s", e$message))
    
    data.frame(
      indicator_id = id,
      status = "ERROR",
      pixel_ones = NA_real_,
      error = e$message,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
  
  results[[idx]] <- res
  
  # Memory status after
  gc()
  mem_after <- as.numeric(system("free -m | grep Mem | awk '{print $7}'", intern = TRUE))
  elapsed <- difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins")
  
  log_msg(sprintf("Memory available after: %d MB (delta: %d MB)", 
                  mem_after, mem_before - mem_after))
  log_msg(sprintf("Time elapsed: %.2f minutes", as.numeric(elapsed)))
  log_msg(sprintf("Result: %s", res$status))
  if (res$status == "SUCCESS") {
    log_msg(sprintf("Pixel count: %f", res$pixel_ones))
  }
  
}

```

# Compile Results

```{r}
results_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(results)

log_msg("")
log_msg("=== TEST SUMMARY ===")
log_msg(paste("Total tests:", nrow(results_df)))
log_msg(paste("Successes:", sum(results_df$status == "SUCCESS")))
log_msg(paste("Failures:", sum(results_df$status == "ERROR")))

print(results_df)

# Save results locally
write.csv(
  results_df,
  "TEST_indicator_results.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

log_msg("Test results saved to TEST_indicator_results.csv")
log_msg("TEST COMPLETE")

```
